useCases.heading: Used in many settings
useCases.subheading: Adaptable to teams and organizations of any industry or size

0.title: Sports Teams
0.desc: Practice & game schedules, shift coordination, attendance tracking, and standings.

1.title: Local Communities
1.desc: Centralize event announcements, circulars, and fee management online.

2.title: Businesses & Workplaces
2.desc: Cross-department project management, approval workflows, and internal communication.

3.title: Education & Schools
3.desc: Parent communication, club management, activity records, photo sharing, and surveys.

0.a: Core features are free. We also offer paid plans for larger teams with advanced needs.

1.q: How many members can I invite?
1.a: Even on the free plan, you can invite multiple members. For large-scale teams, consider our dedicated plans.

2.q: Can I use it on my smartphone?
2.a: Yes. Mannschaft is fully responsive and works on smartphones and tablets via your web browser.

3.a: We use SSL/TLS encryption and perform regular backups to keep your data secure.

4.q: Can I manage multiple teams or organizations?
4.a: Yes. A single account can belong to multiple teams and organizations, each managed independently.

cta.heading: Try it free today
cta.subheading: No credit card required. Sign up now and start managing your team.
